steps.title: Introduce the three parts
steps.content: The clause "The impact of Simpson's work is threefold" is complete and sets up an explanation. The following phrases list the three effects: expanding, challenging, and shedding light.

steps.title: Choose the elaboration mark
steps.content: Choice A uses a semicolon before a phrase that is not an independent clause. Choice B gives no punctuation to signal the explanation. Choice C creates a sentence fragment after the period. A colon correctly introduces the elaboration. The answer is D.
